demographics.living_situation: lives alone at home; a community nurse visits regularly and is present today

opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: I just don't have the strength to stand up anymore; my body feels completely empty.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: The nurse called it in: over the last day she's suddenly gone off her legs and can't get out of the chair or move without full help. She's been fading for months, losing weight and getting weaker, and now she just can't stand.

symptom_narrative.onset: a slow slide over the past year, then a much steeper drop over the last 48 hours; over the past 24 hours she can't rise from the chair at all
symptom_narrative.duration: months of gradual decline, with an abrupt worsening in the last day or two
symptom_narrative.character: no strength or energy at all, feels 'completely empty'; hands too weak to grip her frame, unsteady on her feet before today
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: she says she feels utterly drained and can't do anything for herself now
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: whole body — general weakness, not any one place
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: constant, worse over the last day
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: any effort to move or stand
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: poor appetite and eating very little, has lost weight over the year, feels she thinks less clearly than she used to but knows where she is and the date
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: several falls at home recently, getting more sedentary
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: chair-bound today; needs full assistance to transfer; has lost her independence with washing, dressing and moving around

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: has been getting frailer and weaker for a long time, with several recent falls
has lost a noticeable amount of weight over the past year without trying

current_medications_as_reported.name_as_patient_states: several regular tablets in a blister pack, including a cholesterol tablet

social_history_volunteered.diet_and_exercise: eating very little lately; almost no physical activity, increasingly sedentary
social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: lives alone; a community nurse visits; the home is cluttered and a walking frame is nearby but she can't grip it effectively; at risk of being stuck in the chair overnight

objective_data_offered.value: the visiting community nurse says she cannot get up out of her chair or move without full help today, and her hand grip is very weak
nurse reports she looks very thin and worn out, slumped in the armchair and barely moving on her own
nurse checked her temperature at home and says it was normal, around 36.4 degrees, and she has not felt hot or shivery
nurse read an oxygen level of about 97 percent off a portable finger monitor
weighs about 52 kilograms and the nurse and family feel she has dropped weight over the past year
the home is cluttered; a walking frame is beside her but she cannot grip it; she is at risk of a long lie if left in the chair
